movie.actors: Douglas Smith, Lucien Laviscount, Cressida Bonas, Doug Jones
movie.plot: Three friends stumble upon the horrific origins of a mysterious figure they discover is the root cause of the evil behind unspeakable acts.
movie.title: The Bye Bye Man
movie.writer: Jonathan Penner (screenplay by), Robert Damon Schneck (based on "The Bridge to Body Island" by)
